scripts.test:anvil: pnpm anvil:up && playwright test --project=anvil; EXIT=$?; pnpm anvil:down; exit $EXIT
scripts.test:all: pnpm anvil:up && pnpm test:smoke && pnpm test:wallet && playwright test --project=anvil; EXIT=$?; pnpm anvil:down; exit $EXIT
scripts.anvil:up: ENV_FILES=''; test -f .env && ENV_FILES="$ENV_FILES --env-file .env"; test -f .env.local && ENV_FILES="$ENV_FILES --env-file .env.local"; docker compose $ENV_FILES -f docker-compose.anvil.yml up -d --wait
scripts.anvil:down: ENV_FILES=''; test -f .env && ENV_FILES="$ENV_FILES --env-file .env"; test -f .env.local && ENV_FILES="$ENV_FILES --env-file .env.local"; docker compose $ENV_FILES -f docker-compose.anvil.yml down
